name: LinkFinder AI — Domain → Targeted Prospects (Dept + Seniority)

nodes.name: Set Target Filters
nodes.notes:
✏️ CUSTOMIZE YOUR ICP HERE:

── department ──────────────────
  marketing
  sales
  engineering_technical
  product
  c_suite
  finance
  human_resources
  operations
  information_technology
  legal
  consulting

── seniority ───────────────────
  founder
  owner
  c_suite
  director
  partner
  vp
  head
  manager
  senior
  entry

── employee_count ──────────────
  Max results per domain (1–100)

nodes.name: Read Domains from Sheet
nodes.notes:
📋 Sheet1 must have a column named 'domain'
Examples: tesla.com, apple.com, stripe.com

nodes.name: Linkfinder — Get Targeted Employees
nodes.notes:
🔑 HTTP Header Auth credential:
  Name:  Authorization
  Value: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY

nodes.name: Append Prospects to Sheet
nodes.notes:
📋 Create a 'Prospects' tab with these exact headers:
domain | name | jobTitle | email | linkedinUrl | company | department | city | country | headline | companyLinkedinUrl
